political.s: Via parent company CVS Health: FEC: $15K PAC donations; 100% to Republican, 0% to Democratic committees.  [CA CalAccess + NY COELIG + TX Ethics adds state-level totals.]

labor.s: Via parent company CVS Health: 556 federal penalties totaling $7.2B since 2000 (Violation Tracker).

environment.s: Via parent company CVS Health: CDP Climate Change: B (2024) — management-band disclosure; discloses emissions data but limited target ambition.

dei.s: Via parent company CVS Health: HRC Corporate Equality Index: 100/100 — Equality 100 Leader (2025). Top-rated LGBTQ+ workplace policies, benefits, and culture. HRC Corporate Equality Index 100/100 (2025) — top-tier LGBTQ+ workplace equality rating.

animals.s: Via parent company CVS Health: Wikipedia "Animal welfare" section: In 2016, CVS committed to source 100% cage-free eggs by 2025, responding to pressure from animal welfare groups. In 2023, CVS announced that they reached this goal ahead of schedule, on December 31,…

privacy.s: Via parent company CVS Health: Named in 1 FTC 6(b)/tech report, 1 with adverse findings. Pharmacy Benefit Manager 6(b) (2024) — adverse finding.

health.s: Via parent company CVS Health: CVS opioid settlement (~$5B over 10 years) ($5.00B). CVS / Omnicare $18M FCA case — long-term-care kickbacks ($18M). Plus 1 other public-record finding across 3 sources. Sources: dea-enforcement, doj-fca-healthcare, opioid-settlements.
